purpose.en: Define a coherent photographic world before selecting its viewpoints.
purpose.zh: 在选择摄影视点之前，定义一个连贯的摄影世界。

expected_effects.en: All Jobs remain inferably inside one world.
expected_effects.zh: 所有 Job 均可被推断为处于同一世界。

qa_expectations.en: Every Job has a distinct narrative function and one output.
qa_expectations.zh: 每个 Job 都有不同叙事职能并只输出一张图。

purpose.en: Keep one fictional adult recognizable across all nine viewpoints.
purpose.zh: 让同一虚构成年人物在九次观看中保持可识别身份。

expected_effects.en: Every frame reads as the same adult person.
expected_effects.zh: 每一镜均可识别为同一成年人物。

qa_expectations.en: Compare face, age and proportions across all Jobs.
qa_expectations.zh: 跨全部 Job 比较面部、年龄与比例。

purpose.en: Make the quiet window room a persistent reality rather than a replaceable backdrop.
purpose.zh: 让安静的窗边房间成为持续现实，而不是可随意替换的背景。

expected_effects.en: Different framings still imply one room.
expected_effects.zh: 不同景别仍能推断为同一房间。

qa_expectations.en: Window, floor, table and movement path remain physically compatible.
qa_expectations.zh: 窗户、地面、桌子与行动路径保持物理兼容。

purpose.en: Use restrained editorial photography without overriding identity, event or material truth.
purpose.zh: 采用克制的编辑摄影语言，但不得压过身份、事件或材质真实。

expected_effects.en: The set shares a restrained tactile editorial character.
expected_effects.zh: 整组保持克制、可触的编辑摄影气质。

qa_expectations.en: Reject CGI gloss, beauty-filter skin and decorative excess.
qa_expectations.zh: 拒绝 CGI 光泽、美颜皮肤与装饰过量。

purpose.en: Keep LOOK_A and the blank cream paper physically owned by the subject.
purpose.zh: 保持 LOOK_A，并让米白信纸始终具有明确的主体归属。

expected_effects.en: Wardrobe and paper remain continuous while their state changes naturally.
expected_effects.zh: 服装与信纸保持连续，同时状态自然变化。

qa_expectations.en: The paper never floats, duplicates or changes owner.
qa_expectations.zh: 信纸不得漂浮、复制或改变归属。

purpose.en: Externalize a quiet unresolved decision through gaze, breath and action rather than labels.
purpose.zh: 通过视线、呼吸和动作外化安静而未决的决定，而不是直接贴情绪标签。

expected_effects.en: Emotion is inferred from behavior, not theatrical posing.
expected_effects.zh: 情绪由行为推断，而非戏剧化摆姿。

qa_expectations.en: Expression and gaze follow the current event phase.
qa_expectations.zh: 表情与视线符合当前事件阶段。

purpose.en: Turn the blank paper from an active object of reading into a closed object after decision.
purpose.zh: 让空白信纸从正在阅读的对象转变为决定之后被关闭的对象。

expected_effects.en: Paper orientation and hand action make state changes legible.
expected_effects.zh: 信纸方向与手部动作使状态变化清楚可见。

qa_expectations.en: Each action follows the prior state and leaves a usable next state.
qa_expectations.zh: 每个动作承接前一状态，并留下可供下一镜继承的状态。

purpose.en: Use one coherent viewpoint per Job and varied distances across the sequence.
purpose.zh: 每个 Job 使用一个连贯视点，并在序列中改变观看距离。

expected_effects.en: Nine single viewpoints form a deliberate movement through the world.
expected_effects.zh: 九个单一视点形成对世界的有意游观。

qa_expectations.en: Framings are distinct without breaking room geometry.
qa_expectations.zh: 景别彼此不同，但不破坏房间几何。

purpose.en: Let one east-facing source progress from cool arrival to warm afterglow.
purpose.zh: 让同一东向光源从冷静进入阶段推进到温暖余晖。

expected_effects.en: Light phase makes narrative time perceptible.
expected_effects.zh: 光线阶段让叙事时间可以被感知。

qa_expectations.en: Reject contradictory shadows, multiple suns and clipped highlights.
qa_expectations.zh: 拒绝矛盾阴影、多重太阳和高光溢出。

purpose.en: Keep natural separation and tactile grain subordinate to world and skin.
purpose.zh: 让自然色彩分离与触感颗粒服从世界和肤质。

expected_effects.en: Color changes with light phase without becoming a preset filter.
expected_effects.zh: 色彩随光线阶段变化，但不退化为预设滤镜。

qa_expectations.en: Skin and room materials do not drift between Jobs.
qa_expectations.zh: 肤色与房间材质不得跨 Job 漂移。

purpose.en: Separate static validity from evidence-based human visual QA.
purpose.zh: 严格区分静态合法性与基于证据的人工视觉 QA。

expected_effects.en: Every semantic purpose has an observable acceptance check.
expected_effects.zh: 每个语义目的都有可观察的验收检查。

qa_expectations.en: Do not claim visual pass without linked generated-image evidence.
qa_expectations.zh: 没有关联生成图证据时不得声称视觉通过。

purpose.en: Express an unspoken decision through world and action instead of written explanation.
purpose.zh: 通过世界与行动表达未说出口的决定，而不依赖文字解释。

expected_effects.en: The decision is felt through the paper sequence and final breath.
expected_effects.zh: 决定通过信纸序列与最后呼吸被感知。

qa_expectations.en: The story remains legible without generated captions or typography.
qa_expectations.zh: 故事无需生成字幕或排版文字仍可理解。

purpose.en: Move from arrival through encounter and decision to an unresolved afterword.
purpose.zh: 从进入、接触、决定推进到未完全封闭的余韵。

expected_effects.en: Each Job adds a new function rather than repeating a pose.
expected_effects.zh: 每个 Job 增加新职能，而不是重复姿势。

qa_expectations.en: Removing any Job creates a clear information or rhythm loss.
qa_expectations.zh: 移除任一 Job 都会造成明确的信息或节奏损失。

purpose.en: Make each shot one complete, independently usable act of looking.
purpose.zh: 让每一镜成为完整且可独立使用的一次观看。

expected_effects.en: Every Job produces one finished photograph with a unique role.
expected_effects.zh: 每个 Job 产生一张具有独特职能的完成照片。

qa_expectations.en: Reject grids, collages, storyboards, text, logos and watermarks.
qa_expectations.zh: 拒绝网格、拼图、故事板、文字、标志和水印。

shots.title: Arrival
shots.narrative_purpose: Establish the room and solitary arrival
shots.action: steps into the room while the curtain moves
shots.hands: hands relaxed, anatomically plausible, and consistent with the action
shots.gaze: motivated by the window, paper, or path of movement; never an arbitrary fashion stare
shots.composition: distinct editorial framing with coherent room geometry, controlled depth, and purposeful negative space

purpose.en: Cross the room with the letter lowered
